content: Better Auth Device Authorization plugin (v1.6.20 stable, production-ready): implements RFC 8628 OAuth Device Flow. Server: deviceAuthorization({verificationUri:'/device'}). Client: deviceAuthorizationClient(). DB schema: deviceCode table (id, deviceCode, userCode, userId, clientId, scope, status, expiresAt, lastPolledAt, pollingInterval). Client flow: authClient.device.code() to get codes, authClient.device.token() to poll, authClient.device.approve()/deny() on verification page. v1.6.19 added pre-binding device codes to specific users preventing session hijacking.
